# PcGameArchive

PcGameArchive is a free PC game download website featuring thousands of games across multiple categories with detailed descriptions, system requirements, and screenshots.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://pcgamearchive.com/en) - Browse all games
- [Action Games](https://pcgamearchive.com/en/action) - Fast-paced combat and thrilling gameplay
- [Adventure Games](https://pcgamearchive.com/en/adventure) - Story-driven exploration and puzzle-solving
- [Horror Games](https://pcgamearchive.com/en/horror) - Terrifying survival and psychological horror
- [Indie Games](https://pcgamearchive.com/en/indie) - Creative indie gems and unique experiences
- [Open World Games](https://pcgamearchive.com/en/openworld) - Vast open worlds to explore freely
- [Shooter Games](https://pcgamearchive.com/en/shooter) - FPS and TPS shooting action
- [Simulation Games](https://pcgamearchive.com/en/simulation) - Realistic simulations and management games
- [Sports Games](https://pcgamearchive.com/en/sports) - Sports and racing games
- [Strategy Games](https://pcgamearchive.com/en/strategy) - Tactical and real-time strategy games
- [Blog](https://pcgamearchive.com/en/blog) - Gaming news and articles

## Information Pages

- [About](https://pcgamearchive.com/en/about) - About PcGameArchive
- [Contact](https://pcgamearchive.com/en/contact) - Contact us
- [Privacy Policy](https://pcgamearchive.com/en/privacy) - Privacy policy
- [Terms of Service](https://pcgamearchive.com/en/terms) - Terms and conditions
- [Sitemap](https://pcgamearchive.com/en/sitemap) - Full site sitemap

## Data Feeds

- [RSS Feed](https://pcgamearchive.com/rss/rss-en.xml) - Subscribe to game updates
- [Sitemap Index](https://pcgamearchive.com/sitemap_index.xml) - XML sitemap for search engines

## Site Details

- Supports 34 languages
- Games are organized by category: action, adventure, horror, indie, openworld, shooter, simulation, sports, strategy
- Each game page includes: description, system requirements, screenshots, download links, and developer info
